actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (m_Script GUID d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has m_Delegates eventID=4 (PointerClick) with m_PersistentCalls.m_Calls targeting MonoBehaviour id 1554268810 (GUID 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68) which is Residential.showlabel(). This MonoBehaviour matches the provided Residential script attached to Building3. Expected behavior: when triggered, Player.transform.GetChild(1)'s TextMeshPro.text is set to the first 20 chars of 'Residential:Kumo Apartment' (i.e., truncated label). Building3 has an EventTrigger (m_Script GUID d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) with m_Delegates eventID=4 (PointerClick). The persistent call targets MonoBehaviour id 1554268810 (m_Script GUID 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68), which is the Residential component attached to Building3. Residential.Start() uses GameObject.Find("Player") (id 94196998) and accesses Player.transform.GetChild(1). A TextMeshPro must be on that child. When invoked, Residential.showlabel() sets the label text to the first 20 chars of 'Residential:Kumo Apartment'. Ensure Player exists and is active before triggering. Per constraints, no Grab/Transform on 'Player'.
